my_thoughts: 'I’m hardly one to talk. I have been holding feelings back.'—student presents as guilty retreat. Teacher's move uses subject_object_inversion: 'Do you notice you are describing your behavior now? A moment ago '. Strategy: tracks shift, redirects focus. Hypothesis: subject_object_inversion mechanism will create no_clear_effect. Watching how student responds to this intervention.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student says 'I’m hardly one to talk. I have been holding feelings back.' showing guilty_retreat via self_blame, identification. Teacher responds 'Do you notice you are describing your behavior now? A moment ago ' using subject_object_inversion to tracks shift, redirects focus. Opening UNMAKING move addresses guilty_retreat. Predicting no_clear_effect because subject_object_inversion interventions typically produce this response pattern.
visible_response:
Do you notice you are describing your behavior now?
A moment ago you were freer to talk about the fact that I didn’t help you last time.
If we don’t turn the camera back onto you, how do you experience this anger toward me?
